title: limonium carnosum
intro: Limonium carnosum, also known as Sea Lavender or Rosemary Sea Lavender, is a perennial coastal plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Limonium carnosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
